description: 儿童国际象棋教学平台 - 素材清单（供多Agent协作用）

mascot_queen.name: 小女王琪雅
mascot_queen.description: 平台吉祥物，8岁活泼可爱的小女孩，头戴金色皇后皇冠，手持魔法棋杖
mascot_queen.prompt: A cute cartoon chess queen character for children's learning app, little girl about 8 years old wearing an elegant golden queen crown with chess rook motifs, bright curious eyes, big friendly smile, holding a magic chess piece wand that glows with golden light, flowing dress in gradients of pink and gold, magical sparkles around her, Disney Pixar animation style, soft rounded shapes, white background, high quality, 4k

happy.prompt: A cute cartoon chess queen character for children's learning app, little girl about 8 years old wearing an elegant golden queen crown, extremely happy expression with big smile and sparkly eyes, arms raised in celebration, golden magical sparkles, joyful atmosphere, Disney Pixar animation style, white background, high quality, 4k

thinking.prompt: A cute cartoon chess queen character for children's learning app, little girl about 8 years old wearing a golden queen crown, hand on chin in thinking pose, looking curious and concentrated, magical chess pieces floating around her, soft pastel colors, Disney Pixar animation style, white background, high quality, 4k

explaining.prompt: A cute cartoon chess queen character for children's learning app, little girl about 8 years old wearing a golden queen crown, pointing finger up as if explaining something, big confident smile, magical whiteboard or chess board behind her with glowing pieces, Disney Pixar animation style, white background, high quality, 4k

celebrating.prompt: A cute cartoon chess queen character for children's learning app, little girl about 8 years old wearing a golden queen crown, jumping with joy, confetti and stars around her, huge happy expression, victory celebration pose, golden sparkles everywhere, Disney Pixar animation style, white background, high quality, 4k

mascot_knight.name: 骑士阿塔
mascot_knight.description: 琪雅的伙伴，勇敢的小骑士，头戴战盔，手持小盾牌
mascot_knight.prompt: A cute cartoon chess knight character for children's learning app, small brave boy about 9 years old wearing a golden knight helmet shaped like a chess knight piece, holding a tiny silver shield, determined but friendly expression, blue and silver armor with soft rounded shapes, a small white horse companion beside him, Disney Pixar animation style, white background, high quality, 4k

ready.prompt: A cute cartoon chess knight character for children's learning app, small brave boy wearing a golden knight helmet shaped like a chess knight, holding a silver shield in ready position, determined confident smile, blue and silver armor, small white horse beside him, dynamic pose, Disney Pixar animation style, white background, high quality, 4k

protecting.prompt: A cute cartoon chess knight character for children's learning app, small brave boy wearing a golden knight helmet, standing in front with shield raised protectively, brave expression, blue silver armor, small white horse behind him, magical glow around shield, Disney Pixar animation style, white background, high quality, 4k

proud.prompt: A cute cartoon chess knight character for children's learning app, small brave boy wearing a golden knight helmet, standing with hand on chest proudly, big confident smile, blue and silver armor gleaming, small white horse beside him, stars and sparkles around, Disney Pixar animation style, white background, high quality, 4k

tactic_double_attack.name: 双射战术示意图
tactic_double_attack.prompt: A clear educational cartoon chess tactics diagram for children, showing a chessboard with a white queen piece glowing and shooting two magical golden arrows simultaneously attacking two black pieces, the concept of double attack explained with friendly arrows and sparkles, soft educational colors, white background, includes a cute speech bubble saying 'Two targets at once!', clean and simple style perfect for kids, high quality illustration, 4k

tactic_pin.name: 牵制战术示意图
tactic_pin.prompt: A clear educational cartoon chess tactics diagram for children, showing a chessboard with a white rook laser-beaming a black piece, an arrow showing the king behind it is pinned and cannot move, friendly explanation with a cute locked symbol, soft educational colors, white background, speech bubble 'The king is pinned!', clean style for kids, high quality, 4k

tactic_skewer.name: 引离战术示意图
tactic_skewer.prompt: A clear educational cartoon chess tactics diagram for children, showing a chessboard with a white queen pushing a black king forward with a powerful attack, revealing a black queen behind it that can now be captured, magical arrow showing the kick, soft educational colors, white background, speech bubble 'Push the king, lose the queen!', fun style for kids, high quality, 4k

tactic_discovered.name: 闪躲战术示意图
tactic_discovered.prompt: A clear educational cartoon chess tactics diagram for children, showing a chessboard with a white bishop moving aside to reveal a laser attack from a white rook behind it hitting a black piece, magical reveal effect with sparkles, soft educational colors, white background, speech bubble 'Hidden attack revealed!', fun educational style for kids, high quality, 4k

naming_convention.filename: 全小写，下划线分隔，如 mascot_queen_happy.png

coordination_rules.生图Agent: 读取 pending 状态的条目 → 生成图片 → 保存到 baseDir/category/filename → 更新 status=done
coordination_rules.代码Agent: 只读取 status=done 的条目 → 直接引用 url 字段 → 生成 TypeScript 代码
coordination_rules.禁止: 代码Agent不得引用pending状态的资源
coordination_rules.异常处理: 失败的条目 status=failed，协调者决定重试或跳过
